type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility (01-32) is reporting NOx, CO, PM10, and PM2.5 emissions for 2014. This facility reported NOx, CO, PM10, and PM2.5 emissions for 2013. The following changes occurred from 2012 to 2013, respectively:
1) NOx emissions decreased by 3%
2) CO emissions decreased by 4%
3) PM10 emissions decreased by 40%
4) PM2.5 emissions decreased by 40%
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Flaring volume decreased from 327.5 e3m3 to 84.7 e3m3.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility (01-32) is reporting NOx, CO, PM10, and PM2.5 emissions for 2013. This facility reported NOx and CO emissions for 2012. The following changes occurred from 2012 to 2013, respectively:
1) NOx emissions increased slightly from 258.28 to 270.22 tonnes (+5%)
2) CO emissions increased slightly from 169.46 to 173.03 tonnes (+2%)
3) PM10 emissions increased from 0.75 to 1.63 tonnes (+118%)
4) PM2.5 emissions increased from 0.75 to 1.63  tonnes (+118%)
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Flaring volume increased from 0.3 e3m3 to 327.5 e3m3.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility (01-32) is reporting NOx, CO2, PM10, and PM2.5 emissions for 2012. This facility reported NOx and CO2 emissions for 2011. The following changes occured from 2011 to 2012, respectively:
1) NOx emissions increased from 89.22 to 258.28 tonnes (+189%)
2) CO2 emissions increased from 70.75 to 169.46 tonnes (+140%)
3) PM10 emissions increased from 0.27 to 0.75 tonnes (+174%)
4) PM2.5 emissions increased from 0.27 to 0.75  tonnes (+174%)
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Large equipment expansion; added three (3) Waukesha 1,480 hp engines, two (2) Caterpillar 400 hp engines, one (1) Caterpillar 95 hp engine and 125 heaters.
